scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter frontend dev" "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter auth dev" "pnpm --filter @cubedocs/admin dev"
scripts.build: concurrently "pnpm --filter frontend build" "pnpm --filter api build" "pnpm --filter auth build" "pnpm --filter @cubedocs/admin build"
scripts.deploy: concurrently "pnpm --filter frontend deploy" "pnpm --filter api deploy" "pnpm --filter auth deploy" "pnpm --filter @cubedocs/admin deploy"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently "pnpm --filter frontend typecheck" "pnpm --filter api typecheck" "pnpm --filter auth typecheck" "pnpm --filter @cubedocs/admin typecheck"
scripts.migrate: pnpm --filter api migrate && pnpm --filter auth migrate
